title: nonatelia micrantha
intro: Nonatelia micrantha, also known as the desert holly, is a succulent shrub native to the southwestern regions of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to promote healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Nonatelia micrantha include the potential to soothe skin conditions, reduce fever, and support immune function.
